mapper.select: SELECT co.id AS company_id, co.name AS company_name, co.region, co.sort_index AS company_sort_index, st.id AS station_id, st.name AS station_name, st.capacity_kwp, st.status AS station_status, st.data_quality, st.sort_index AS station_sort_index, COUNT(sg.id) AS strategy_count, SUM(CASE WHEN sg.status = 'active' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS active_count, SUM(CASE WHEN sg.status = 'pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pending_count FROM sa_company co JOIN sa_station st ON st.company_id = co.id LEFT JOIN sg_strategy sg ON sg.station_id = st.id GROUP BY co.id, co.name, co.region, co.sort_index, st.id, st.name, st.capacity_kwp, st.status, st.data_quality, st.sort_index ORDER BY co.sort_index, st.sort_index
